subject: [PATCH v2 02/28] filelock: add support for ignoring deleg breaks for dir change events

2026-04-16.patch_summary: This patch adds support to the Linux filelock system for ignoring delegation breaks on directory change events in NFS clients. It introduces a new flags parameter to try_break_deleg() and modifies __break_lease to ignore certain types of delegation break events, allowing the client to be notified of changes after the fact instead of recalling the delegation.
